description_long: This is a tall, slender floor lamp with a minimalist, modern design. It features a thin vertical pole anchored by a cylindrical base, with two large, circular lamp heads mounted at different heights along the pole. Each lamp head is oriented outward, likely to provide directional lighting, and the heads have a metallic or matte finish. At the very top of the pole is a small spherical decorative finial. A visible power cord extends from the base, indicating it is electrically powered. The overall aesthetic is sleek and functional, suitable for contemporary urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A modern, minimalist floor lamp with two large circular lamp heads on a slim pole, anchored by a cylindrical base and topped with a small sphere.
description_view_0: The lamp is seen from a slight angle, showing both lamp heads and the power cord extending left from the base.
description_view_1: This view highlights the alignment of the lamp heads and the cord curving to the right, with the pole and base clearly visible.
description_view_2: The lamp is viewed from the opposite side, with both lamp heads visible and the cord trailing away from the viewer.
description_view_3: A frontal view with both lamp heads facing forward, the cord extending directly toward the viewer, and the pole and base in full alignment.
